violations.text: Handwashing sinks in restrooms are lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted to notify food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage shelves in walk in cooler have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The outside trash compacter and dumpster area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and other debris. Refuse areas must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The floors in walk in cooler and food storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The ceiling in the upstairs storage area is in poor repair. Observed a leak from ceiling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
